nasb.text: Every work which he began in the service of the house of God in law and in commandment, seeking his God, he did with all his heart and prospered.

esv.text: And every work that he undertook in the service of the house of God and in accordance with the law and the commandments, seeking his God, he did with all his heart, and prospered.

cnv.text: 他經辦的一切事，無論是關於神殿的事奉，或是關於律法和誡命的遵行，他都尋求他的　神。因為他盡心去行，所以盡都順利。

ccb.text: 无论是在上帝的殿中事奉，还是遵行律法和诫命，他都寻求他的上帝，尽心去做。因此，他行事顺利。
